meta.title: Westbrook Insurance Brokers — Vancouver
meta.description: Independent commercial and personal insurance brokerage in Vancouver, BC. Plain-language quotes, fair coverage, no surprises.

business.name: Westbrook Insurance Brokers
business.tagline: Plain-language insurance for Vancouver businesses and families.

data.headline: Insurance, in plain English.
data.subhead: We work for you, not an insurer. Quotes from 14 carriers, fair recommendations, no jargon.

image.alt: Westbrook Insurance team in their downtown Vancouver office

trustItems: Same broker for life of policy

items.title: Commercial Property & Liability
items.description: Coverage for retail, restaurants, professional offices, contractors, and more.

items.title: Personal Auto
items.description: ICBC plus optional add-ons. We'll find you the right combination, not the highest premium.

items.title: Home & Tenant
items.description: Standard, high-value, and condo policies. Detailed coverage reviews on request.

data.headline: Three brokers, twenty years of experience.
data.narrative: Westbrook Insurance Brokers was founded in 2009 by Sara Westbrook, joined by Jamie Lin in 2014 and Dev Patel in 2019. We're independent — we represent fourteen carriers, not one — and we keep our roster small on purpose so you talk to the same broker every year.

data.headline: From the people who renewed with us this year.

items.author: Marisa T.
items.text: Sara reviewed our restaurant policy and saved us $1,800 by spotting overlapping coverage. Fast, kind, professional.

items.author: Greg H.
items.text: Got my home + auto + business bundled and somehow paid less than I had with one of the big-name companies. They explained everything in human English.

items.author: Aisha K.
items.text: Filed a claim through them after a break-in. They walked me through every step. The claim closed in under 3 weeks.

data.headline: Free 15-minute coverage review.
data.subhead: Send us your current policy. We'll tell you where you're over-paying or under-covered. No commitment.

data.headline: Downtown Vancouver. Phone, email, or in-person.
